one_time_description: Rapid Housing Initiative funding of $1,745,000 recognized as revenue in 2024 (nil in prior year)
economic_notes: Nation has interests in Tsi'deldel Development Limited Partnership (99.99%, equity method), Tsi Del Del Enterprises Ltd (50%), River West Forest Products Ltd (22% - inactive), Eniyud Community Forests Ltd (50%), Cariboo Indian Enterprises Ltd (7%), Central Chilcotin Rehabilitation Ltd (50%), Dandzen Development Limited Partnership (17% - solar farm 1MW PV plant). Earnings from investment in Nation partnerships were $1,799,178.
notes: Budget was not prepared for all segments so budget vs actual comparison is not on same scope. Nation consolidates Social Housing and Tsi'deldel Development Corporation as subsidiaries; Tsi'deldel Development Limited Partnership (99.99%) accounted for by modified equity method with year-end December 31, 2023. Several entities recorded at cost including Eniyud Community Forests (50%), Dandzen Development LP (17% solar farm). Forest Range Agreement of $288,710 appears in budget but $0 actual. Ottawa Trust Fund had Section 69 withdrawal of $787,811 reducing revenue trust balance. Accumulated surplus per balance sheet is $42,471,206 (includes remeasurement losses of -$66,787) vs $42,537,993 on operations statement due to remeasurement. Restricted cash includes Gaming ($1,591,769) and Social Housing ($57,093). ISC deferred revenue decreased significantly from $5,427,277 to $924,751. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $10,927,043 + FNHA $1,617,728 + CMHC $52,460 + TNG $4,376,945 + FNESC $213,556 + RHI $1,745,000 = $18,932,732; osr = $25,028,649 - $18,932,732 = $6,095,917. Remeasurement losses of $66,787 on portfolio investments recorded in separate statement.
